title: Character Reference Chain
description: Reference chain for a character under Element Reference Generation Policy v2. Two pipelines supported: (1) standard adult performance character — two-stage Midjourney chain stage_1 (narrative identity) -> stage_2 (omni-reference refinement) -> handoff to ChatGPT Images 2 for the scale-angle three-view pack; (2) protected-subject infant pipeline (additive Phase 6 branch) — identity_pipeline set to gpt_images_2_direct_protected_subject, MJ stages explicitly skipped via stage_1_skipped, and stage_3 records the GPT Images 2 first-reference + perspective pack handoff. Active branch is determined by presence of identity_pipeline; default (omitted) is the standard MJ pipeline. Metadata-only: stores prompt template references and external reference IDs, never image binaries. This record must never contain or modify pack_status, canon_lock, approved, locked, or selected lifecycle fields.

oneOf.description: Standard adult performance-character Midjourney narrative-identity then omni-reference pipeline. Active when identity_pipeline is omitted.
Protected-subject infant GPT Images 2 direct pipeline (Phase 6 additive branch).

prompt_template_ref.description: Relative path to the operator prompt template, e.g. templates/element_reference_prompts/character_mj_v8_narrative_identity.md.

model_guidance_snapshot_ref.description: Relative path to the model_guidance_snapshot governing the Midjourney version used.

output_ref.description: External reference for the selected Stage 1 image. external://... once generated; pending_external://... while scaffolded.

full_body_required.description: Optional. Full body is not a quality gate under policy v2; defaults to not required when omitted.

prompt_template_ref.description: Relative path to the operator prompt template, e.g. templates/element_reference_prompts/character_mj_v7_oref_refinement.md.

input_ref.description: Must reference the Stage 1 output (the image uploaded as the Omni Reference).

output_ref.description: External reference for the refined omni-reference identity lock.

uses_oref.description: Stage 2 uses the Midjourney --oref Omni Reference; expected true.

source_reference_id.description: The reference ID the downstream model consumes as source_reference_id. For standard MJ pipeline this mirrors stage_2.output_ref identity; for protected-subject GPT Images 2 direct pipeline this mirrors stage_3.first_reference_output_ref.

identity_pipeline.description: Optional. Marks an additive non-MJ pipeline branch. Currently only gpt_images_2_direct_protected_subject is supported (Phase 6 infant / protected-subject branch). When present, stage_1 and stage_2 are not required; stage_1_skipped + stage_3 are required instead (enforced via oneOf at top level).

reason.description: Explicit explanation for why the standard MJ Stage 1 + Stage 2 pipeline is skipped. Required to avoid silent skips.

first_reference_output_ref.description: External reference for the GPT Images 2 first-reference output that serves as identity source for the perspective pack. external://... once generated; pending_external://... while scaffolded.

perspective_pack_id.description: ID of the linked gpt_images_perspective_pack record that consumes first_reference_output_ref as source_reference_id.

care_context_required.description: Protected-subject ethics flag. When true, perspective pack prompts must include explicit care context (safe support, infant blanket, or identity-neutral support hand).
